name: nothing-browser
description: Does nothing... except everything that matters. A scrapper-first browser.
author: BunElysiaReact

scripts.build: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && make -j$(nproc)
scripts.build:debug: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && make -j$(nproc)
scripts.dev: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && make -j$(nproc) && ./nothing-browser
scripts.cmake:reconfigure: npm run cmake:clean && npm run cmake:configure
